  "findings": [
    "Rigging hook safety latch is missing or intentionally tied back, rendering the hook unsafe for lifting operations."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the defective hook from service immediately.",
    "Replace the hook with one having a functional, self-closing safety latch, or install an approved replacement latch kit before commencing work."
  ],
  "rationale": "A hook latch that is missing or tied back defeats the safety mechanism designed to prevent slings or rigging hardware from accidentally slipping out of the hook throat. Under ASME B30.10 and OSHA standards, hooks must be equipped with a latch unless the application makes the use of a latch impractical or more hazardous, and active rigging must not have safety devices intentionally bypassed.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.10",
    "OSHA 1926.251"
  ]
}
